PATIENT ADMISSION GUIDELINES:
Documents Required: Valid Government Photo ID (Aadhaar/Passport/Driving License), Previous medical records, Insurance card (if applicable), Emergency contacts of 2 relatives, Referral letter (if applicable).

What to Bring: Prescription medications (original packaging), Medical reports/X-rays/scans, Toiletries, Comfortable clothing, Mobile phone & charger, Cash for miscellaneous expenses.

What NOT to Bring: Alcohol, tobacco, sharp objects, electrical appliances, pets, large amounts of cash/jewelry, outside food (unless doctor-approved), strong perfumes, candles.
Laptops need to be registered. Personal medical equipment must be inspected.

VISITOR REGULATIONS:
General Visiting Hours:
- Ward Patients: 4:00 PM - 6:00 PM daily
- ICU Patients: 11:00 AM - 11:30 AM and 5:00 PM - 5:30 PM
- Private Rooms: 3:00 PM - 7:00 PM

Rules: Maximum 2 visitors per patient. Children under 12 not allowed in ICU. Valid ID required for ICU visitors. One overnight attendant allowed (with permission). Maintain silence, no eating in patient rooms, phones on silent.

FINANCIAL POLICIES:
Payment accepted: Cash, credit/debit cards, UPI, online transfers. Advance deposit required at admission. Insurance claims processed within 48 hours. Final bill settlement before discharge.
Billing: +91-80-2345-6790 | billing@sunrisehospital.com (Mon-Fri 9AM-5PM)

EMERGENCY CONTACTS:
Emergency Department: +91-80-2345-6799
Ambulance Service: 108 (Toll-free, free of charge)
Hospital Security: Extension 555
Nursing Station: Extension 333

Emergency Codes: Code Blue = Cardiac Arrest | Code Red = Fire | Code Yellow = Missing Patient | Code Pink = Child Abduction

FOOD & NUTRITION SERVICES:
Meal Timings: Breakfast 7:30-8:30 AM | Lunch 12:30-1:30 PM | Evening Tea 4:00-4:30 PM | Dinner 7:30-8:30 PM
Special diets available: Diabetic, Low-sodium, Soft/liquid, Vegetarian/Non-vegetarian, Religious requirements.
Outside food generally not permitted without doctor approval. Special permission for pediatric and maternity patients.

DISCHARGE PROCESS:
Doctor's discharge order required → Settle final bill → Collect discharge summary and prescriptions → Return hospital property → Schedule follow-up appointment.
